title: Introducing OKFN’s AI Learning Labs
content:
We are partnering with organisations on high-impact social issues to experiment with AI and develop replicable methods together; you can join us

The post Introducing OKFN’s AI Learning Labs first appeared on Open Knowledge Blog.
